fields.name: Phone
fields.reason: Can be collected during KYC step if needed for advanced features
fields.recommendation: Make optional or collect during KYC verification process instead

fields.name: CIN Manual Number Input
fields.reason: Could be extracted from image using OCR instead of manual entry
fields.recommendation: Implement optional automatic extraction from CIN front image

fields.name: Edit Profile submenu
fields.reason: Implementation incomplete with only Alert placeholders, no actual edit functionality
fields.recommendation: Complete implementation or remove until ready. Currently shows TODO comments (lines 76-88)

unusedScreens.name: SustainabilityScreen
unusedScreens.functionality: Displays hardcoded sustainability stats (paper saved, CO2 reduced, trees planted)
unusedScreens.reason: Promotional content with no real functionality or data integration. Stats are completely hardcoded and not fetched from any API.
unusedScreens.userAccessPath: Not accessible from main tab navigation - requires modal navigation
unusedScreens.recommendation: REMOVE - Creates navigation clutter without functional value. If sustainability tracking is planned, defer until backend integration is ready.

unusedScreens.name: FeedbackScreen
unusedScreens.functionality: Simple feedback form with rating and text input, submits via Alert
unusedScreens.reason: No backend integration, incomplete API connection. Feedback is only shown via Alert, not persisted anywhere.
unusedScreens.userAccessPath: Modal navigation only - not discoverable from main interface
unusedScreens.recommendation: CONSIDER REMOVING or complete backend integration. Currently just shows mock confirmation with no data persistence.

unusedScreens.name: SupportScreen
unusedScreens.functionality: Displays hardcoded support contact information and placeholder for live chat
unusedScreens.reason: All contact info is hardcoded. Live chat button has empty onPress handler. No real integration with any support system.
unusedScreens.recommendation: EITHER integrate with real support system OR simplify by embedding contact info in Settings screen

unusedScreens.name: HelpScreen
unusedScreens.functionality: FAQ section with hardcoded Q&A content
unusedScreens.reason: Static content with no backend integration. Could be replaced with web view or simplified in-app help.
unusedScreens.recommendation: REFACTOR: Consider using collapsible sections within ProfileScreen or convert to web view pointing to help center

unusedScreens.name: SecurityScreen
unusedScreens.functionality: Biometric and 2FA toggles without backend implementation
unusedScreens.reason: UI-only toggles with no actual backend functionality. Changes to toggles don't persist or affect authentication.
unusedScreens.recommendation: EITHER implement backend 2FA/biometric system OR combine with SettingsScreen and remove standalone navigation

designIssues.issue: Inconsistent Font Sizes - Hardcoded Values Throughout Codebase
designIssues.description: Multiple screens use hardcoded fontSize instead of theme.typography system. This creates maintenance issues and inconsistency.

examples.shouldBe: Centralize in textStyles or component-level constants

designIssues.impact: Inconsistent typography hierarchy, harder to update brand aesthetics globally
designIssues.recommendation: CREATE a comprehensive textStyles mapping for all font sizes used. Update all hardcoded fontSize values to use theme.textStyles.

designIssues.issue: Hardcoded Colors Not Using Theme System
designIssues.description: Several inline color definitions don't use the centralized colors theme, making it hard to implement theme switching.

examples.shouldBe: Create primaryLight or primaryTransparent in colors

designIssues.impact: Impossible to implement theme switching (dark/light mode) consistently
designIssues.recommendation: Audit all hardcoded hex colors and add missing colors to colors.ts. Replace with theme references.

designIssues.issue: Layout Spacing Inconsistencies - Mixed Spacing Standards
designIssues.description: Some screens use theme spacing (good), others have arbitrary pixel values that don't align with spacing scale.

examples.shouldBe: Use spacing constants: spacing.xxxl (32) + spacing.lg (16) + spacing.md (12) = 60

examples.currentStyle: Inline pixel values: marginTop: 16, marginBottom: 8, marginRight: 4

designIssues.impact: Inconsistent visual rhythm, harder to maintain design consistency
designIssues.recommendation: Create helper function to map arbitrary spacing to nearest theme value

designIssues.issue: Color Contrast Issues - Some Text on Light Backgrounds
designIssues.description: Minor contrast issues in a few locations where text color might not meet WCAG AA standards.

examples.issue: Status text uses refText with small font (micro) - may be hard to read
Some textStyles use hardcoded colors that conflict with theme intent
examples.example: '#1A73E8' hardcoded in brandName style instead of colors.primary

designIssues.impact: Potential accessibility issues for users with vision impairments
designIssues.recommendation: Audit text-background combinations. Ensure minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1 for normal text.

designIssues.issue: Crowded Layouts - Too Much Content in Some Areas
designIssues.description: Some scrollable screens pack too much information without breathing room. Content density is high in places.

examples.issue: Multiple infoRow items stacked with minimal padding between items
examples.recommendation: Add more vertical spacing between info sections (spacing.lg instead of spacing.md)

examples.issue: Text and progress indicators feel cramped

designIssues.impact: Reduced readability, cognitive load on user
designIssues.recommendation: Increase spacing between logical sections. Review paddingVertical and marginBottom values.

componentQuality.summary: All custom components are actively used. No unused components found. However, Toast component is exported but never imported in any screen.

components.name: CreditCard
components.note: Specialized component for displaying credit objects with progress

components.name: Loader
usedIn: MANY SCREENS (HomeScreen, ProfileScreen, MyCreditsScreen, KycScreen, etc.)

components.name: Toast
components.note: Complete ToastProvider implementation with useToast hook exists but is NEVER IMPORTED in any screen. Could be valuable addition if integrated.
components.recommendation: EITHER remove if not needed OR integrate into app for better notification handling (replacing Alert.alert calls)

unusedComponents.name: Toast
unusedComponents.reason: Exported and fully implemented but never imported or used in any screen
unusedComponents.recommendation: Remove if unused, or integrate ToastProvider into App.tsx and replace Alert.alert() calls throughout app with toast.show()

textReadabilityIssues.issue: Micro Font Size in Status Text
textReadabilityIssues.description: Transaction reference using textStyles.micro (fontSize: 12) might be too small to read comfortably on some devices
textReadabilityIssues.currentCode: refText: { ...textStyles.micro, color: statusColor, marginTop: spacing.xs, fontWeight: '600' }
textReadabilityIssues.recommendation: Use textStyles.caption (fontSize: 12 but better weight) or textStyles.label as backup

textReadabilityIssues.issue: Unsafe Color Combinations in Error States
textReadabilityIssues.description: Error icon and text color may not have sufficient contrast ratio
textReadabilityIssues.recommendation: Add explicit color values ensuring WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1 minimum)

textReadabilityIssues.issue: Font Weight Inconsistency in Micro Text
textReadabilityIssues.description: Typography.micro defined as fontSize: 12 with no specified weight, causing inconsistency when used with different font weights
textReadabilityIssues.recommendation: Define micro with default font weight in theme: { fontSize: 12, fontWeight: '400' }

textReadabilityIssues.description: Large emoji/logo icons (fontSize: 32-36) might not render consistently across devices
textReadabilityIssues.recommendation: Use dedicated SVG icons instead of emoji for critical UI elements

textReadabilityIssues.description: textStyles.brandName has hardcoded color '#1A73E8' instead of using colors.primary
textReadabilityIssues.recommendation: Change to: color: colors.primary from imports

highPriority.reason: Currently shows TODO comments and Alert placeholders only

highPriority.task: Integrate Toast Component or Remove It
highPriority.reason: Fully implemented but never used. Replace all Alert.alert() calls with toast.show()

highPriority.task: Audit and Fix Hardcoded Font Sizes
highPriority.reason: Multiple screens use hardcoded fontSize instead of theme.typography

mediumPriority.reason: Promotional content with hardcoded data, no real functionality

mediumPriority.task: Implement Backend for SecurityScreen or Merge with Settings
mediumPriority.reason: Currently UI-only toggles with no persistence

mediumPriority.task: Replace Hardcoded Colors with Theme System
mediumPriority.reason: Some screens have hardcoded hex colors

mediumPriority.task: Implement Backend Support for SupportScreen and HelpScreen

lowPriority.reason: Some text-color combinations might not meet AA standards

Make Phone Field Optional in Registration

navigationIssues.issue: Too many modal screens (12 out of 20)
navigationIssues.impact: Navigation hierarchy becomes complex, users may not discover secondary features
navigationIssues.solution: Consider consolidating peripheral features (Help, Support, Feedback, Sustainability) into a single 'More' section
